mapper.update: UPDATE file_meta SET ref_count = ref_count + 1 WHERE file_id = #{fileId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE file_meta SET ref_count = GREATEST(ref_count - 1, 0) WHERE file_id = #{fileId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select:
SELECT fm.* FROM file_meta fm WHERE fm.status != #{deletedStatus} AND fm.deleted_at IS NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_file uf WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} AND uf.status = 0 AND uf.is_dir = 0 AND uf.file_id = fm.file_id )
AND fm.mime_type LIKE CONCAT(#{mimePrefix}, '%')
AND fm.file_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY fm.created_at DESC
